final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among AI concepts: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, sketch-like linework with loose ink strokes, educational explainer infographic in the spirit of sketchnote / visual thinking
Composition: vertical layout with each concept in its own labeled node or bubble, connected by annotated arrows showing relationships, balanced use of whitespace between sections
Subject: seven interconnected concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with a short definition label and a small illustrative icon or doodle
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper-texture background, no photographic environment
Lighting/mood: flat, bright, approachable and friendly; no shadows or dramatic lighting
Color palette: warm off-white base with 4–5 accent colors (e.g. teal, coral, amber, soft purple) used consistently per concept node to aid visual separation
Materials/textures: hand-drawn ink line texture, subtle paper grain, occasional hatching for depth
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must be legible at thumbnail size; relationship arrows must be annotated with brief connector phrases; definitions must be readable short phrases, not full paragraphs
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D effects, corporate slide aesthetic, clipart icons, overly dense text blocks, generic Behance flat-design style
